chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1314 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.5575/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 24.01.2024 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Anwar Ali Lohar, Advocate for respondent No.8. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for respondent No.8, a contractor i.e. Hasnain Akhtar & Co. engaged by Engro Power Generation Qadirpur Limited, District Ghotki for laying underneath lines, has undertaken to compensate petitioner in accordance with law within a period of three weeks without fail. Subject to payment of such compensation to petitioner, he shall allow the company to make repair work of the line(s). The petition is accordingly disposed of along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
